client_subnets.description: The list of subnets in the client VPC to connect to.

security_groups.description: The security groups to attach to the ENIs for the broker nodes.

target_cluster_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID of the remote client.

authentication.description: The authentication type for the client VPC connection. Specify one of these auth type strings: SASL_IAM, SASL_SCRAM, or TLS.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.
